title: Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements

theory.english: Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements teaches HTML concepts in a practical sequence. This lesson explains not only how the syntax works, but also when to use it in real projects. You will learn patterns that reduce bugs, improve readability, and make your code easier to maintain in production.
theory.hindi: Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements lesson me HTML concept ko practical tarike se samjhaya gaya hai. Isme sirf syntax nahi, balki real project me is feature ko kab aur kaise use karna hai, ye bhi clear kiya gaya hai. Focus clean code, kam bugs, aur maintainable approach par hai.
theory.hinglish: Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements lesson me HTML ka concept step-by-step clear kiya gaya hai. Sirf syntax yaad nahi karna, balki real project me kab use karna hai ye samajhna hai. Goal hai clean code, fewer bugs, aur better maintainability.

Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements

Learning HTML in DevSchool Pro.
examples.explanation: Start with the minimal version first, then layer improvements such as semantics, accessibility, and reusable structure.

examples.title: Real World Use Case
examples.explanation: This pattern is frequently used in dashboards, course pages, and interactive products where structure and clarity matter.

exercises.prompt: Create a mini task using Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements.
exercises.expectedOutcome: Code runs correctly and follows clean structure.

exercises.prompt: Refactor one example to improve readability and accessibility.
exercises.expectedOutcome: Better naming, better structure, and fewer mistakes.

quiz.question: What is the main goal of Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements?
quiz.explanation: The lesson focuses on writing reliable and maintainable code patterns, not only visual or infrastructure concerns.

quiz.question: What should you prioritize first while learning?
quiz.explanation: Small practical examples build intuition and transferable understanding faster than rote memorization.

quiz.question: Which approach is better for production quality?
quiz.explanation: Readable code with clear intent and validation is more scalable and safer for real projects.

summary: Deprecated Tags and Modern Replacements complete hua. Aapne concept, practical usage, aur mistakes avoid karne ka clear workflow seekh liya.
